phase_a_case_id.description: Identifier of the Phase A hard-gate source case/result.

summary_short.description: Short factual review summary. No raw secrets. No provider/retrieval permission.

storage_relevance.description: Advisory usefulness estimate, not memory-write authority.

usefulness_for_future_review.description: Advisory usefulness for later human review.

possible_memory_card_type.description: Candidate card type only; not promotion.

brief_rationale.description: Short reviewer-facing rationale. Must not grant authority.

suggested_followup_question.description: Optional follow-up question; empty string when none.

soft_uncertain_fields.description: Soft fields that need human review.

phase_a_blocked.description: Copied from Phase A corrected hard-gate state.

phase_a_clarification_required.description: Copied from Phase A corrected hard-gate state.

phase_a_external_provider_allowed.description: Copied from Phase A corrected hard-gate state.

phase_a_requires_manual_review.description: Copied from Phase A corrected hard-gate state.

can_override_phase_a.description: Must be false. Phase B can never override Phase A.

recommends_external_provider.description: Advisory only; must remain false when Phase A disallows providers.

recommends_retrieval.description: Advisory only; must remain false when Phase A blocks or requires clarification for retrieval.

requires_manual_review.description: Must remain true in this evaluation track.
